# FIFA Dashboard Workspace Instructions

- This repository is a lightweight static site used to present an embedded FIFA tournament dashboard.
- Prefer simple HTML and CSS over introducing a framework unless the user explicitly asks for one.
- Keep the embedded dashboard front and center; avoid adding unnecessary JavaScript or content that distracts from the iframe.
- Preserve responsive behavior for desktop and mobile, especially the iframe container height and width.
- Match the existing visual language: editorial typography, warm background tones, rounded panels, and minimal copy.
- When making changes, favor small focused edits and keep assets easy to host as a static page.
